title: ONEVER Football Kick Trainer - Footballs Training Equipment, Soccer Solo Skill Practice Training Aid, Training Aid Footballs Skills Improvement for Kids Adults Football Gifts for Boys
features: YOUR BEST FOOTBALL TRAINER === Hands-free football kick trainer can release players hands, maximizing the number of ball touches, increasing your passing, shooting, catching, dribbling and overall footwork feel. Therefore, it enables fast and repeatable ball touch training.This new evolution soccer kick trainer is perfect for solo training,fits ball sizes 3, 4 , 5 and all standard soccer, also for soccer/volleyball/rugby

BEST FOOTBALL TRAINING AID === Upgrade the widened side waist protection to better secure your waist and When you are training, you won't hurt your waist because you lean back too much.The protective mat covered by the breathable mesh makes it not feeling hot. Adjustable and durable Velcro fastening waistband and universal ball holder suitable both for the young,the elder and the kids,can use this in home garden, have much fun for families and keep healthy

HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL === Use Durable neoprene enough to hold the ball firmly and high quality elastic nylon materials, the strong buckle, the fine stitches ensure the training aid lasting durability, which guarantees you kicking a long time.Length of elasticity: 5m (max)

EASY &FAST TO INSTALL === Just slide the ball inside the round strap that opens and closes using. Soccer training aid are made of high quality elastic nylon materials, the strong buckle, the fine stitches ensure the training aid lasting durability, which guarantees you kicking a long time

PERFECT GIFT === This football training accessories will be a good gift for children, boys, girls, students, teenagers and adults. It suit for all levels, no matter you are a kid or an adult, a beginner or pro, the soccer kick trainer is a perfect football training aid for you.You can practice football skills in your garden without any danger of upsetting the neighbors by losing the ball over their (low) hedge. It's brilliant!
description: Product Description Step 1 Place the football in the bottom sleeve Step 2 Align the 4 patches and adjust according to the size of the football Step 3 Wrap the belt around your body and adjust to the right size Step 4 Thread the elastic cord through the waistband and start Football Training The training belt is suitable for size 3, 4 and 5 footballs. Improve your football control skills as well as kicking, pitching, goalkeeping skills and more with the adjustable football training strap. Football Gifts for Boys ONEVER soccer training straps are suitable for all ages for all stages of training. Whether you are a beginner or a professional, you can use this belt to achieve the ideal training effect.
